rulings.Case Title: MORIA FONG ET AL VS. KENNETH LEW ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Injunction
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 9, 2017 line 4. PLAINTIFFs MORIA FONG, LINCOLN FONG, ALEXANDER LEW, TINGLEY LEW's Motion For Preliminary Injunction Hearing Required. Parties to meet and confer and (1) present to the Court names of potential third-party management companies and/or referees; and (2) a list of necessary tasks that cannot be delayed until the resolution of this action to be performed by (a) property manager and (b) financial manager, e.g. collection of rent, new tenant application review, minor/emergency repairs; insurance/mortgage payment, vendor payment, etc. The parties to daft and agree as to form two versions of proposed orders: (1) appointing a third party manager with specified limited rights and responsibilities; and (2) appointing Moria Fong and Baldini as financial and property managers with specified limited rights and responsibilities. = (501/REQ)
